framework.name: Agent Operating Constraints Model
framework.description: AI agents operate within pre-approved rules around price, brand preference, frequency, and payment credentials. They function as delegated decision-makers executing transactions within human-defined boundaries using existing payment infrastructure (authorization, authentication, dispute frameworks).
framework.raw_quote: Acting within user-defined rules, agents can search, negotiate and transact on consumers' behalf... AI effectively functions as a personal digital agent that can source and negotiate and complete purchases using pre-approved or approved payment methods

source.title: AI Agents Start Shopping and Payments Firms Adapt | PYMNTS.com
